text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I can just feel the tension in the air... Sparks
could fly any second.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Not gonna lie, I kinda am. But I can't get all
scared and tarnish my name.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm here for first place. I won't accept anything
less.

Her firm voice makes it clear how resolved she is
for this race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make good on my word!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here, folks. Today is the senior G1
Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which runner will emerge victorious from the
fray?!
